title: ghost stories in Tamar Valley Tales ghost stories
publication_or_organisation: Tasmanian blog explores quirky history, from ghost stories to pigeons and penguins; ABC Hobart / Jodie Lee
australian_relation: ABC Hobart public program item about a Tasmanian history blog covering folklore and ghost stories.
evidence_summary: ABC Hobart reported that Tamar Valley resident Jodie Lee had started Tamar Valley Tales, a blog with Tasmanian history ranging from folklore to ghost stories and extending beyond the Tamar Valley from small bites of hidden history to longer reads.
